scope: source-model authority gates for storage-intent acknowledgment ordering, membership, media, placement, trust, capacity, recovery, freshness, result, and refusal evidence
residual_risk: Source-model evidence only. Mounted runtime receipt production, QEMU crash and fault behavior, POSIX fsync/fdatasync/FUA/barrier semantics, distributed transport execution, successor/comparator wording, production readiness, and release readiness remain non-validated.
